# Workflow Commands

## Phase commands

- `/sensei:idea` — explore a concept
- `/sensei:analyze` — assess feasibility
- `/sensei:blueprint` — design architecture
- `/sensei:plan` — decompose into issues
- `/sensei:build` — implement with TDD
- `/sensei:validate` — verify acceptance criteria
